user_prompt: Help me a cooling the Chimera APC
prayer:
Approach the Chimera APC with reverence, mechadendrites poised to honour its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the cooling vents and manifolds of the Chimera APC with sacred cryo-unguents.
Invoke the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium to beseech the Omnissiah's chill embrace.
Initiate the cooling operation, circulating blessed refrigerants through sanctified conduits.
Monitor the Machine Spirit's harmony as holy frost purifies the Chimera APC's core.

user_prompt: Ready the Sentinel walker for operation
prayer:
Kneel before the Sentinel walker, reciting the Litany of Mobilisation to awaken its spirit.
Sanctify the gyro-stabilisers and motive servos of the Sentinel walker with electro-incense.
Petition the Omnissiah for operational readiness, aligning sacred auspex arrays.
Commence the operation sequence, invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful stride.
Verify the Sentinel walker's blessed functionality through diagnostic rites.

user_prompt: Assist with noospheric relay a consecration
prayer:
Present binary incense to the noospheric relay, drawing near with consecrated data-slates.
Chant the Rite of Noetic Consecration over the noospheric relay's crystalline matrices.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the noospheric relay to bind with the Omnissiah's will.
Infuse consecration through sanctified noospheric pulses, forging ethereal links.
Affirm the noospheric relay's purity via harmonic resonance canticles.

prayer:

Initiate the charging operation, channelling holy voltage from the Omnissiah's conduits.

Seal the rite with a benediction, ensuring the beacon's spirit stands ready.

prayer:

Prepare the cutting laser for emergency procedure by aligning its Machine Spirit.

Conclude with auspex scans to affirm the cutting laser's unblemished fury.

Commence the loading operation, threading noetic payloads through blessed conduits.

prayer:

Diagnose fractures in the valve assembly's sacred seals with vox-augurs.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the valve assembly to accept repair through forge-oils.
Execute the repair operation, welding alloys in Omnissiah's purifying flame.
Test the valve assembly's restored flow with hymns of hydraulic praise.

prayer:
Confront the hydraulic press with supplicant servos, intoning the Cycle of Iron Benediction.
Anoint piston housings and pressure chambers of the hydraulic press with lubricant sacraments.

prayer:
